# Contract-First API Design (OpenAPI + Code Generation)

---

## What Is Contract-First?

Write your OpenAPI spec **before** writing code. Benefits:
- Frontend and backend can work in parallel
- No surprises in the API shape
- API documentation is always accurate
- Client SDKs auto-generated and type-safe

---

## Minimal API → Auto-Generated OpenAPI (Code-First fallback)

If starting from code, use attributes to enrich the generated spec:

```csharp
app.MapPost("/api/products", CreateProduct)
   .WithName("CreateProduct")
   .WithSummary("Creates a new product")
   .WithDescription("Creates a new product in the catalog. Returns 201 with the created product.")
   .WithTags("Products")
   .Produces<ProductDto>(201)
   .ProducesValidationProblem()
   .ProducesProblem(409)
   .WithOpenApi(op =>
   {
       op.RequestBody.Required    = true;
       op.RequestBody.Description = "Product creation payload";
       return op;
   });
```

---

## NSwag — Generate C# Client from OpenAPI Spec

```bash
dotnet tool install -g NSwag.ConsoleX
```

```json
// nswag.json — configure client generation
{
  "documentGenerator": {
    "fromDocument": {
      "url": "https://api.example.com/openapi/v1.json"
    }
  },
  "codeGenerators": {
    "openApiToCSharpClient": {
      "namespace": "MyApp.ApiClient",
      "className": "ProductsApiClient",
      "generateClientInterfaces": true,
      "injectHttpClient": true,
      "generateUpdateJsonSerializerSettingsCode": false,
      "outputFilePath": "src/MyApp.ApiClient/Generated/ProductsApiClient.cs"
    }
  }
}
```

```bash
nswag run nswag.json
```

---

## Kiota — Microsoft's Code Generator

```bash
dotnet tool install -g Microsoft.OpenApi.Kiota
```

```bash
# Generate a client from a remote OpenAPI spec
kiota generate \
  --language CSharp \
  --class-name ProductsApiClient \
  --namespace-name MyApp.ApiClient \
  --openapi https://api.example.com/openapi/v1.json \
  --output ./src/MyApp.ApiClient/Generated

# Generate TypeScript client (for frontend)
kiota generate \
  --language TypeScript \
  --class-name ProductsApiClient \
  --namespace-name myapp.api \
  --openapi ./openapi.yaml \
  --output ./frontend/src/api/generated
```

---

## WireMock.NET — API Mocking for Tests

```bash
dotnet add package WireMock.Net
```

```csharp
// Mock a third-party API in integration tests
public class ThirdPartyApiMock : IAsyncLifetime
{
    private WireMockServer _server = null!;

    public string BaseUrl => _server.Url!;

    public Task InitializeAsync()
    {
        _server = WireMockServer.Start();

        _server
            .Given(Request.Create()
                .WithPath("/api/shipping/rates")
                .WithHeader("Authorization", new WildcardMatcher("Bearer *"))
                .UsingGet())
            .RespondWith(Response.Create()
                .WithStatusCode(200)
                .WithHeader("Content-Type", "application/json")
                .WithBody("""
                {
                  "rates": [
                    { "carrier": "DHL", "price": 12.50, "days": 3 }
                  ]
                }
                """));

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }

    public Task DisposeAsync()
    {
        _server.Stop();
        _server.Dispose();
        return Task.CompletedTask;
    }
}
```

---

## OpenAPI Document Customizations

```csharp
// Program.cs — enrich autogenerated OpenAPI document
builder.Services.AddOpenApi(options =>
{
    options.AddDocumentTransformer((document, ctx, ct) =>
    {
        document.Info = new OpenApiInfo
        {
            Title       = "My API",
            Version     = "v1",
            Description = "My API for managing products and orders.",
            Contact     = new OpenApiContact
            {
                Name  = "API Team",
                Email = "api@example.com",
                Url   = new Uri("https://docs.example.com"),
            },
            License = new OpenApiLicense
            {
                Name = "Apache 2.0",
                Url  = new Uri("https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html"),
            },
        };

        document.Servers =
        [
            new OpenApiServer { Url = "https://api.example.com", Description = "Production" },
            new OpenApiServer { Url = "https://api-staging.example.com", Description = "Staging" },
        ];

        return Task.CompletedTask;
    });

    // Add Bearer token to Scalar UI
    options.AddDocumentTransformer<BearerSecuritySchemeTransformer>();
});
```
